items.title: Madonna offers reward for return of missing Coachella costume
items.dek: The items, which she says are "part of my history", disappeared after her slot with Sabrina Carpenter.
items.body: The items, which she says are "part of my history", disappeared after her slot with Sabrina Carpenter.

items.title: South Africa's police boss charged in connection with controversial health contract
items.dek: Fannie Masemola is accused of failing in his duties to provide proper oversight in his role.
items.body: Fannie Masemola is accused of failing in his duties to provide proper oversight in his role.

items.title: The Onion launches new effort to turn Infowars into parody website
items.dek: The new proposal would involve the publication licensing Alex Jones's company, which faces liquidation.
items.body: The new proposal would involve the publication licensing Alex Jones's company, which faces liquidation.
